objective: Build a typed, serde-backed ExploreConfig model persisted to project-local .grove/explore.json as the shared vocabulary for the S02 mcp-llm inner explorer subsystem.
key_changes: Add `pub mod explore;` to core/src/lib.rs; optionally re-export config types in the curated public surface
New core/src/explore/mod.rs re-exporting ExploreConfig, Provider, Mode
New core/src/explore/config.rs: Provider{Ollama,LlamaCpp}, Mode{Standard,Balanced,Aggressive}, ExploreConfig struct
Atomic save: write temp file in same dir then rename — hardening over existing plain fs::write registry pattern
Fail-fast validation: missing-file steers to `grove init --as mcp-llm`/`grove config`; bad enum names field + legal values
Default impl yields Ollama defaults (http://localhost:11434/v1, Standard mode, allowed_tools=[grove,rg,grep,find])
Inline #[cfg(test)] tests: serde round-trip, defaults, validation errors, atomic-write behavior
Gates: cargo tree shows no clap; no `fastcontext` string; build/clippy/test clean
Purely additive — only lib.rs edited among existing files; no schema/migration/version bump
